visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a young woman wearing a white off-shoulder top and a black-and-white patterned bucket hat standing in a Costco warehouse. She is holding two large gift sets from the brand 'Honey Pads,' each containing a plush animal and a rolled-up blanket. The background is filled with warehouse shelving and similar product boxes. (2) The woman brings a lavender-colored set featuring a plush bear closer to the camera, rotating it to show the packaging details. She points to the text on the box and the floral pattern of the blanket inside. (3) The camera shifts to close-up shots of other variations of the product, including a pink rabbit set and a blue sheep set. The woman highlights the soft texture of the fabric and the various floral designs on the blankets. (4) The woman returns to holding the lavender bear set, gesturing towards its features and then giving a thumbs-up to the camera while smiling, emphasizing the value and appeal of the item.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 這個送禮. [Slogan]: 三合一只要$449元. [Variety]: 超美花卉布偶寶寶毯. (2) [Slogan]: 超不傷荷包. [Slogan]: 超划算 449元. (3) [Subtitle]: 超划算 449元. (4) [Subtitle]: 然後它是玩偶. (5) [Subtitle]: 裡面加一個毯毯. (6) [Subtitle]: 還有一個收納布. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後最重要. (8) [Subtitle]: 這個收納袋啊. (9) [Subtitle]: 是這種布質的. (10) [Subtitle]: 你看超漂亮的. (11) [Subtitle]: 它的紋路好好看哦. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後還有這個提袋. (13) [Subtitle]: 圖案的話有三款. (14) [Subtitle]: 有粉色的兔子. (15) [Subtitle]: 然後它這個袋子. (16) [Subtitle]: 真的很好看. (17) [Subtitle]: 你看它這個毯子. (18) [Subtitle]: 看起來顏色就很高級. (19) [Subtitle]: 藍色的小羊. (20) [Subtitle]: 然後藍白色的花好好看. (21) [Subtitle]: 紫色的小熊. (22) [Subtitle]: 我覺得它紫色. (23) [Subtitle]: 撞綠色的花紋. (24) [Subtitle]: 真的很有sense. (25) [Subtitle]: 超好看耶. (26) [Subtitle]: 哇. (27) [Subtitle]: 這個放在房間小朋友. (28) [Subtitle]: 碰到都不會受傷. (29) [Subtitle]: 推.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in a warehouse setting.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair, wearing a white textured off-shoulder top, a black and white patterned bucket hat, and a necklace.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse store, with high metal shelves stocked with cardboard boxes of plush toys and blankets.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks with high energy and a bright, friendly tone, introducing a product. Background music is an upbeat electronic pop track with a steady kick drum. (2) A short 'bubble' sound effect triggers as the speaker highlights the product's price. The music continues at a consistent tempo. (3) Subtle rustling sounds of plastic and cardboard are heard as the speaker moves the product boxes to show different angles. (4) A soft 'ding' or chime sound effect occurs as the speaker points to specific textures on the blanket. (5) The speaker's arousal level remains high throughout, concluding with an enthusiastic recommendation as the music fades out quickly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Product Variations -> Detail Highlight -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a three-piece baby blanket and plush toy gift set available at Costco, emphasizing its high value, attractive floral designs, and giftability for children.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on showcasing a specific product (Honey Pads 3-piece set) available at a specific retailer (Costco) with price information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social media style common in shopping vlogs, with heavy use of text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
